name: danho-detailpage-maker-codex
description: Codex plugin for Korean ecommerce detail-page planning, reference design essence extraction, pragmatic benefit-first Korean copy review, mandatory designed full-image sections, locked typography/infographic image prompting, hybrid HTML/image publishing, native image generation, and mobile-first design QA.

interface.shortDescription: Hybrid Korean ecommerce detail pages in Codex.
interface.longDescription: Plan Korean ecommerce product detail pages, extract reusable design/layout essence from supplied reference detail-page design files, run a planning-to-PM-review revision loop before copywriter review, infer speaker/listener/tone context, review visible copy for natural Korean buyer-first benefits with ethical persuasion principles, require a shopping-mall-style review/testimonial section with editable cards and replacement-ready mock reviews when real reviews are missing, build low-dependency static hybrid HTML/image pages from PLANNING.md, COPY_REVIEW.md, REFERENCE_DESIGN_ANALYSIS.md, and DESIGN.md with controlled headline typography, require generated designed full-image hero and final product/result closing sections without purchase-action text, generate full-section and support images through the built-in Codex image_gen.imagegen GPT Image 2.0 (gpt-image-2) native path, prompt typography and infographics with locked text assets, layout grammar, reading flow, whitespace, controlled type hierarchy, and concrete module primitives, use prepared independent image batches after image-plan approval, and validate copy, color, layout, duplicate image/HTML text, plus 860px source width readability after scaling to a 438px phone preview without requiring Playwright, Python, Node, or a dev server.
defaultPrompt: 한국 상세페이지 기획을 먼저 만들고 자연스러운 커머스 카피로 다듬어줘
하이브리드 상세페이지로 통 이미지 섹션과 HTML+이미지 섹션을 나눠 제작해줘
image-plan 확정 후 이미지를 병렬 배치로 생성해줘
